running-man-exit-signs.name: Running Man Exit Signs
running-man-exit-signs.intro: Searching for running man exit signs installed and certified to modern escape-route standards? Icomply supply and fit pictogram running-man legends with correct arrows for corridors, stairs, final exits and alternative routes across the North West. We install, test, convert and certify as part of our emergency lighting service under BS 5266, leaving monthly/annual test records and duration certificates that satisfy landlords, insurers and auditors.
running-man-exit-signs.body: Based in Stockport (SK2), we cover Greater Manchester, Lancashire, Cheshire, Merseyside and Cumbria. Running-man signage has largely replaced worded EXIT legends; we replace faded, incorrectly arrowed or non-compliant signs and align mounting height and viewing distance with best practice. Options include bulkhead-style, blade, recessed and edge-lit LED units in maintained or non-maintained formats. Whether you manage a care home, warehouse, shop or multi-let office, we quote after survey, complete duration tests where required, and can combine signage works with wider emergency lighting remedials so one visit closes multiple FRA actions.
running-man-exit-signs.meta_desc: Running man exit signs supply & install across Greater Manchester & the North West. BS 5266 LED pictograms, testing & certs from Icomply.
focus_points: Survey and fixed-price quote for running-man exit sign upgrades
ISO pictogram legends with correct directional arrows and viewing distances
LED maintained/non-maintained fittings and circuit integration
Duration testing, logbook entries and portfolio upgrades for multi-site clients
faq: Are running man exit signs mandatory?
UK practice expects clear, illuminated escape-route signage; running-man pictograms are the widely recognised format and are commonly required by fire risk assessments and insurers.
Can you replace old EXIT text signs with running man legends?
Yes. We swap outdated text signs for compliant LED running-man units and retest the emergency circuit as part of the works.
Do running man signs need battery backup?
Emergency exit signs must remain legible on mains failure for the required duration, so battery-backed emergency versions are used on escape routes.

salto-access-control.name: Salto Access Control
salto-access-control.intro: Salto access control delivers modern, often wire-free electronic locking for offices, education, healthcare and multi-tenant buildings that need flexible credentials without heavy door cabling. Icomply Property Services design, install and support Salto access control across the North West — from individual online or offline locks to wider networked platforms. Based in Stockport, we survey doors, fire interfaces and user management needs, then provide fixed-price proposals with commissioning and administrator training.
salto-access-control.body: Salto systems excel where traditional cabling is difficult: heritage doors, glass doors and multi-door fit-outs benefit from electronic escutcheons and cylinders managed by software. We plan credential types, access levels, time profiles and audit requirements with the client’s security policy. Fire-escape doors and life-safety behaviour are treated carefully during design. Integration with reception processes, intercoms and visitor management can be scoped where needed. Maintenance covers battery schedules, firmware updates under approval, and rapid response when locks fail. Documentation includes enrolment procedures so estates teams can add and remove users confidently. Coverage includes Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and Cumbria.

faq: Is Salto completely wireless?

Can Salto replace mechanical master-key systems?
Yes — electronic credentials often replace complex mechanical key suites while improving audit trails and lost-key response.

secure-door-entry-access.name: Secure Door Entry Access
secure-door-entry-access.intro: Secure door entry access combines controlled credentials with reliable door hardware so only authorised people enter, while visitors can be vetted where door entry is linked. Icomply install and maintain secure door entry access solutions for offices, blocks and commercial premises across the North West, aligning access control, locks and free escape with practical day-to-day use.
secure-door-entry-access.body: Security fails when systems are awkward — propped doors and shared codes undo expensive hardware. We design usable secure entry: the right reader height, reliable locks, clear admin processes and optional video door entry for remote release. From Stockport we cover Greater Manchester and neighbouring counties for new secure entrances, upgrades from mechanical keys and repairs when entry becomes unreliable.
secure-door-entry-access.meta_desc: Secure door entry access across Greater Manchester & the North West. Icomply install controlled entry with access credentials, locks & fixed quotes.
focus_points: Usable secure entry design that staff and residents will follow
Readers, locks and free-escape devices correctly matched
Optional video door entry and remote release integration
Upgrade paths from keys and shared codes to managed access
faq: How is secure door entry access different from a simple intercom?
Intercoms allow conversation and release; secure access adds credentials, schedules and audit trails so everyday entry is controlled without reception always present.
Can visitors still get in securely?
Yes via video door entry, reception release or temporary credentials depending on the property type.
Do you handle both hardware and programming?
Yes. Install, lock interface and credential programming are delivered as one coordinated package.

secure-entry-intercom.name: Secure Entry Intercom
secure-entry-intercom.intro: Secure entry intercom pairs visitor call and visual verification with robust door control so only authorised people enter. Icomply designs secure entry intercom for North West sites that need stronger than a basic doorbell — clinics, offices with confidential areas, plant compounds and residential blocks with higher footfall risk. We combine durable stations, correct lock hardware, fire-safe egress and optional access credentials under one entrance design.
secure-entry-intercom.body: Security is not only about thick steel; it is about process. We set call routing to monitored desks, log-friendly platforms where required, and release permissions that match your policy. Installations from Stockport cover Greater Manchester and the wider North West. Pairing intercom with CCTV at the same door face improves evidence when incidents occur. Commissioning includes dual-check of fail-safe or fail-secure behaviour against the fire strategy.
secure-entry-intercom.meta_desc: Secure entry intercom for higher-risk doors across the North West. Icomply design visitor call, video verification & safe lock control. Survey & fixed quotes.
focus_points: Threat-aware entrance design with video and speech verification
Lock, power and fire-egress behaviour designed as one package
Monitored call routing to security or reception desks
Optional credential access alongside visitor intercom release
faq: Does secure entry intercom replace access control?
It complements access control. Visitors use intercom; staff and residents typically use fobs or cards. Both can share the same door hardware.
What about emergency exit?
Final exits must free people in a fire. We design release methods that meet the building’s fire strategy while keeping day-to-day security intact.
Can we record who was buzzed in?
Some platforms offer call logs or snapshots. Continuous video usually sits on a linked CCTV system — we can specify both.

security-lighting-installation.intro: Want security lighting installation that deters intrusion and improves camera performance after dark? Icomply design and install commercial and external security lighting for yards, façades, loading bays and multi-let estates across Greater Manchester and the North West. Install, circuiting and commissioning for yards, façades and car parks
Coordination with CCTV upgrades and multi-site FM programmes
faq: Is security lighting different from emergency lighting?
Yes. Security lighting is for deterrence and visibility under normal or switched power; emergency lighting is battery-backed for escape routes under BS 5266. We can design both on the same estate.
Can lights be motion-activated only?
PIR-triggered circuits work well for pathways and side elevations; continuous low-level lighting with boost on detection is common for high-risk perimeters.

Yes. We work for freeholders, managing agents, care providers and commercial occupiers across the North West.

self-test-emergency-lighting.name: Self Test Emergency Lighting
self-test-emergency-lighting.intro: Self-test emergency lighting automates function and duration checks inside each luminaire or via a monitored system, reducing reliance on manual ladder tests for every fitting. Icomply supply, install and configure self-test and addressable emergency lighting across North West commercial estates from our Stockport base. You still need competent oversight—but self-test makes BS 5266 routines more practical for multi-storey and multi-site operators.
self-test-emergency-lighting.body: We specify stand-alone self-test heads or networked reporting systems depending on building size and FM preference. Installation includes correct labelling, dashboard or LED status interpretation training, and integration with your compliance calendar. Annual full-duration verification and defect repair remain part of a professional regime even when daily/monthly checks are automated.
self-test-emergency-lighting.meta_desc: Self-test emergency lighting install & setup. BS 5266 automated testing — Manchester & North West. Icomply.
focus_points: Self-test and monitored emergency lighting design
Install, addressing and status training
Alignment with monthly/annual compliance duties
Defect response when self-test reports failure
faq: Does self-test remove all manual testing?
It reduces routine manual function tests, but responsible persons must still monitor results and arrange repairs. Periodic competent inspection remains wise.
Are self-test fittings more expensive?
Unit cost is higher, yet labour savings on large sites often justify the investment. We can compare lifecycle cost on survey.
Can self-test work on existing wiring?
Many self-contained LED self-test luminaires retrofit onto existing unswitched permanent lives. We confirm circuit topology first.
self-test-emergency-lighting.seo_keywords: self test emergency lighting, self-testing emergency lights, automatic emergency lighting test, self-test BS 5266, self-test Manchester, Stockport emergency lighting, North West, Icomply

self-testing-emergency-lighting.name: Self Testing Emergency Lighting
self-testing-emergency-lighting.intro: Self-testing emergency lighting automates function and duration checks, reducing reliance on manual key tests across large estates. Icomply supply, install and support self-testing emergency luminaires across Greater Manchester and the North West, still working within BS 5266 expectations for siting, duration and records. From Stockport we help FM teams cut missed monthly tests while keeping human oversight of results and physical condition.
self-testing-emergency-lighting.body: Self-test fittings run scheduled discharges and report status via indicators or, on advanced systems, networked dashboards. They do not remove the need for competent review: dirty lenses, obstructed lights and failed modules still need engineers. We specify reputable self-test ranges, commission schedules to avoid every fitting discharging at once, and train staff on status LEDs. For multi-site landlords, self-test plus periodic professional inspection is a strong compliance model. If you already have standard fittings, we can phase self-test replacements into natural failure or upgrade cycles rather than forcing a single capital hit.
self-testing-emergency-lighting.meta_desc: Self-testing emergency lighting install & support across GM & the North West. BS 5266-aware LED self-test systems from Icomply Stockport. Free quotes.
focus_points: Specification and install of self-test emergency luminaires
Staggered test scheduling to protect overall coverage
Staff training on status indicators and fault response
Periodic professional inspection alongside automation
faq: Do self-testing lights remove the need for an engineer?
No. They automate tests but engineers still remediate faults, verify installation quality and support formal records.
Are self-test fittings suitable for small buildings?
They help any size of premises, though the biggest time savings appear on larger multi-fitting estates.
Can self-test integrate with building management systems?
Some ranges offer networked reporting; we advise on options that match your budget and IT constraints.

shock-sensor-installation.name: Shock Sensor Installation
shock-sensor-installation.intro: Shock sensors detect attack on glass, frames and fragile panels before an intruder is fully inside — ideal for shop fronts, patio doors and vulnerable windows. Icomply install and calibrate shock sensors on intruder systems across the North West, balancing sensitivity so genuine attacks trigger while traffic vibration does not.
shock-sensor-installation.body: We survey glazing types, frame materials and ambient vibration (roads, plant, heavy doors) before choosing analyser modules or detector models. Installation includes firm mounting, cable management or wireless pairing, threshold setup and supervised testing with controlled knocks. Shock devices work best as part of a layered design with contacts and PIRs. From Stockport we retrofit shock protection onto existing panels when insurers or risk assessments request better perimeter defence.
shock-sensor-installation.meta_desc: Shock sensor installation for windows, shop fronts & frames. Calibrated protection across Manchester, Stockport & the North West.
focus_points: Shock detection for glass and frames before full entry
Sensitivity calibration to cut traffic-related false alarms
Retrofit onto many existing graded systems
Layered design with contacts and room PIRs
faq: Will shock sensors false alarm on a busy road?
Correct specification and calibration keep false alarms low. We test on site and adjust thresholds; extreme sites may need alternative or dual methods.
Are they suitable for double glazing?
Yes when mounted on the frame as the manufacturer intends. We do not glue random sensors to glass without a proper design.
Can shock sensors work wirelessly?
Many modern ranges offer wireless shock devices. We confirm compatibility with your panel or hub during survey.
shock-sensor-installation.seo_keywords: shock sensor installation, window shock sensor alarm, glass break shock detector, shop front alarm sensor, shock sensor North West, perimeter alarm Manchester

shop-alarm-installation.name: Shop Alarm Installation
shop-alarm-installation.intro: Retail premises need alarms that protect stock after hours without creating constant false alarms from street traffic and HVAC. Icomply design and install shop alarm systems for high streets, retail parks and independents across Greater Manchester and the North West — covering shutters, rear yards, stockrooms and sales floors with a practical grade and monitoring strategy.
shop-alarm-installation.body: Surveys look at opening hours, cash handling, stock value, neighbouring units and existing CCTV or access control. We specify contacts on shutters and doors, appropriate PIRs or dual-tech detectors, optional shock on display windows and clear arming at lock-up. Monitored options and keyholder procedures suit multi-branch retailers. Installation is scheduled around trading where possible, with commissioning after hours if needed. Maintenance keeps batteries and sensors reliable through seasonal peaks.
shop-alarm-installation.meta_desc: Shop alarm installation for retail & high street units. Shutter contacts, stockroom protection & monitoring — North West fixed quotes.
focus_points: Retail-focused design for shutters, stockrooms and sales floors
Install programmes that respect trading hours
Optional ARC monitoring for multi-branch operators
Integration awareness with CCTV and access control
faq: Can you install while the shop stays open?
Much of the work can be done during quiet periods; noisy or power-related tasks are often left to closed hours. We agree a programme with the manager.
Do insurers require a particular grade for shops?
Many commercial policies prefer graded systems under PD 6662. We design to the grade your broker or risk assessment specifies.
Can staff arm the system easily at lock-up?
Yes — we prioritise simple exit routes, clear keypad location and optional fobs so lock-up is quick and consistent.

shop-cctv-installation.name: Shop CCTV Installation
shop-cctv-installation.intro: Shop CCTV installation deters theft, monitors till points and covers stockrooms and rear exits where retail losses often occur. Icomply fit discreet and overt camera systems for high-street, parade and retail-park shops across Greater Manchester, with HD or 4K options, remote viewing for owners and tidy installs that respect customer-facing presentation.

sip-intercom-installation.name: SIP Intercom Installation
sip-intercom-installation.intro: SIP intercom installation connects door and desk stations to SIP-capable phone systems and softphones so calls ring existing extensions rather than a separate proprietary handset everywhere. Icomply delivers SIP intercom installation across the North West for businesses that want door calls on their UC platform, with correct codecs, DTMF lock release and firewall rules agreed with IT. Ideal for multi-site operators standardising on one dial plan.
sip-intercom-installation.body: We survey the PBX or cloud UC tenant, install SIP door stations and any analogue gateways required, and prove call quality and release codes end-to-end. Documentation covers SIP credentials handling, failover notes and user how-to for reception teams. From Stockport we cover Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire and Merseyside. Security hardening — strong passwords, firmware levels and restricted management access — is part of our commissioning checklist, not an afterthought.
sip-intercom-installation.meta_desc: SIP intercom installation by Icomply — door stations on your phone system across Greater Manchester & the North West. UC-friendly design, install & test.

DTMF or relay lock release proven during commissioning
IT coordination for SIP trunks, codecs and network security
Reception training and admin documentation at handover
faq: Will SIP intercom work with Microsoft Teams or cloud PBX?
Many SIP stations and gateways integrate with cloud UC via certified or supported paths. We confirm compatibility before you order hardware.
How does the door unlock on a SIP call?
Usually by pressing a DTMF key that triggers a relay on the door station or interface. We set and test the digit during commissioning.
Is SIP more complex than a standalone intercom?
It needs more IT involvement, but day-to-day answering is simpler when staff already live on their desk phones or soft clients.

socket-installation.name: Socket Installation
socket-installation.intro: Extra sockets reduce trailing leads and overloaded multi-boards—one of the simplest electrical upgrades for homes, offices and rental voids. Icomply installs new double sockets, USB outlets and dedicated circuits where load demands it, across Greater Manchester and the North West. From Stockport our electricians plan routes carefully, match finishes where possible, and certificate new work to BS 7671 so landlords and homeowners have a clean paper trail.
socket-installation.body: We assess whether a spur from an existing ring is appropriate or whether a new radial circuit from the consumer unit is safer for high-demand rooms. Kitchen appliance points, home office desks and commercial benching often need thoughtful spacing and height. Surface trunking or chased-in cables are chosen to suit decoration plans. After install we test continuity, polarity and earth fault loop values, then leave the area tidy. Bundle socket installation with lighting changes or a board upgrade when you want one visit instead of three.
socket-installation.meta_desc: Socket installation for homes & workplaces across Greater Manchester & the North West. USB & double sockets fitted by Icomply Stockport.
focus_points: New double, switched and USB socket outlets
Safe spur or new circuit design to BS 7671
Kitchen, office and rental void packages
Testing and certification for added outlets
faq: Can you add a socket without rewiring the house?
Often yes via a compliant spur or additional point on a ring, subject to load and cable condition. We confirm on site.
Do you supply metal-clad sockets for workshops?
Yes. Industrial and garage environments can use metal-clad or high-IP accessories as specified.
How soon can sockets be fitted?
Small domestic jobs are often same-week when materials are standard; larger commercial runs are scheduled after a quick survey.

solar-inverter-installation.name: Solar Inverter Installation
solar-inverter-installation.intro: Solar inverter installation converts DC generation from PV arrays into usable AC power and is critical to system efficiency and safety. iComply installs and electrically integrates solar inverters with correct isolation, labelling and AC connection to the property distribution system.
solar-inverter-installation.body: String sizing, ventilation clearances and shutdown devices are checked so inverters operate within manufacturer limits. We configure monitoring portals where included and verify generation readings at handover. If you already have panels but a failed inverter, we can assess like-for-like or improved replacements.
solar-inverter-installation.meta_desc: Solar inverter installation and replacement in the North West. Safe AC integration, isolation and monitoring setup.
focus_points: String and hybrid inverter electrical fit-out
AC/DC isolation and warning labels
Monitoring app or portal configuration
Failed inverter diagnosis and replacement
faq: How long do solar inverters typically last?
Often around a decade, though environment and quality vary. Warranties differ by brand and should be registered at install.
Can I upgrade to a hybrid inverter for batteries later?
Sometimes existing PV can feed a hybrid unit; compatibility and board space need checking. We assess before you buy batteries.
Why is my inverter showing a grid fault code?
Grid voltage parameters, loose AC connections or DNO-side issues can trigger faults. Diagnosis separates inverter failure from supply conditions.
solar-inverter-installation.seo_keywords: solar inverter installation, PV inverter install, hybrid inverter installation, solar inverter replacement, solar inverter North West

solar-panel-installation.name: Solar Panel Installation
solar-panel-installation.intro: Solar panel installation turns roof space into on-site generation when structural, electrical and grid connection factors align. iComply supports solar PV electrical works including AC connection, isolation, generation meters and compliance with relevant standards.
solar-panel-installation.body: Roof mounting and panel supply may be packaged with partners; electrical safety, G98/G99 considerations and consumer unit integration remain central to a durable system. Monitoring setup helps you verify output after handover. Request a desk study with roof photos and a recent electricity bill to start feasibility.
solar-panel-installation.meta_desc: Solar panel installation support and PV electrical connection across the North West. Safe grid-tied systems.
focus_points: PV electrical connection and isolation
Generation metering and labelling
Grid notification pathway guidance
Handover with monitoring access
faq: Can solar work on a shared or flat roof?
Many roof types are viable if structure, waterproofing and orientation allow. Specialist roofing input is included where needed.
What happens during a power cut?
Standard grid-tied systems shut down for safety unless battery and islanding features are designed in. We explain modes clearly before you order.
Do I need a new consumer unit for solar?
Not always, but spare ways, surge protection and correct isolation are mandatory checks. Board upgrades are quoted only when justified.
solar-panel-installation.seo_keywords: solar panel installation, solar PV install, rooftop solar electrician, grid tied solar, solar panel installation North West

Doors, soft furnishings and distance reduce dB levels. We measure and add or reposition devices to meet design targets.

staff-attack-alarm.intro: Need a staff attack alarm system so lone workers and care staff can summon help discreetly or urgently? Icomply design, install and maintain staff attack (staff assist) alarms for care homes, clinics and supported living across the North West. Fixed-price surveys from Stockport cover fixed buttons, portable fobs and integration with nurse call panels.
staff-attack-alarm.body: Staff attack alarms protect people who support vulnerable or unpredictable service users. We specify discrete wall buttons, portable devices, clear staff indication and reset procedures that prevent accidental silencing. Systems can stand alone or integrate with nurse call for unified response. Coverage surveys ensure portable devices work in gardens, car parks and remote wings where risk is often highest. Training and drill support help embed procedures. PPM tests devices and batteries on a schedule. Serving Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and Cumbria with reactive repair options.

Related but distinct: staff attack prioritises staff safety, often with discrete activation and different escalation.
Can devices be worn as pendants?
Yes — portable fobs and pendants are common; we manage registration and batteries.
Will it alert external monitoring?
Optional via agreed interfaces; many sites keep response internal to trained staff.

staff-attack-alarm-system.name: Staff Attack Alarm System
staff-attack-alarm-system.intro: Looking for a staff attack alarm system that protects colleagues in care, clinical and supported environments? Icomply supply, install and maintain staff attack (staff protection / panic) solutions—often integrated with or alongside nurse call—for North West care homes, clinics and community facilities. Discrete pendants, fixed panic buttons and clear location indication help summon assistance when verbal call is not enough.
staff-attack-alarm-system.body: Staff safety technology must be dependable under stress: simple activation, unambiguous alerts and reliable coverage in bedrooms, corridors, medication rooms and gardens. We survey risk areas with your managers, recommend fixed buttons, wearable fobs or dual-function devices, and programme indication so responders know where help is needed. Installation covers receivers, repeaters where wireless, cabling for hardwired points, and integration with existing nurse call or security systems where appropriate. Maintenance includes battery changes for portable devices, functional drills and documentation for health and safety records. From Stockport we serve Greater Manchester and the wider region with fixed quotes after site assessment and training for your teams on daily use and reset procedures.
staff-attack-alarm-system.meta_desc: Staff attack alarm system install & service for care and healthcare. North West coverage from Icomply in Stockport & Greater Manchester.
focus_points: Risk-led survey of high-vulnerability rooms and lone-working areas
Fixed and wearable staff attack devices with clear location alerts
Integration options with nurse call, door entry or security platforms
PPM, pendant batteries and staff familiarisation training
faq: Is a staff attack system the same as nurse call?
They are related but different. Nurse call is primarily resident-initiated assistance; staff attack is staff-initiated emergency help. Many sites run both, sometimes on linked platforms.
Do you offer wireless staff attack solutions?
Yes, where coverage testing supports reliable radio performance. We validate signal strength and add repeaters if needed before handover.
Can existing nurse call support staff attack devices?
Often yes, depending on brand and capacity. We assess your panel and propose native modules or a complementary system where required.

stairwell-smoke-vent.name: Stairwell Smoke Vent
stairwell-smoke-vent.intro: Is your stairwell smoke vent seized, undersized or missing from the fire strategy hardware list? Icomply install, repair and service stair smoke ventilation—roof AOVs, head-of-stair vents and related controls—for apartment blocks and commercial buildings across the North West. Clear stairs are fundamental to escape; reliable venting helps keep them tenable when smoke threatens common parts.
stairwell-smoke-vent.body: Stairwell smoke vents must open fully on demand, resist weather when closed, and report faults to the control system. We survey stair heads and roofs, fit or replace vents and actuators, wire to AOV panels, and commission with full open/close witnessing. Common defects include perished seals, failed chain actuators, flooded lids and panels that no longer supervise field circuits. Annual testing confirms performance for responsible persons and building safety files. Multi-stair buildings can be maintained under a single contract with standardised records. From Stockport, Icomply covers Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire and Merseyside with fixed-price proposals after access assessment.
stairwell-smoke-vent.meta_desc: Stairwell smoke vent install, repair & testing. AOV stair protection for blocks across Greater Manchester & the North West.
focus_points: Stair-head and roof smoke vent survey, install and retrofit
Actuator and weather lid repairs for reliable full opening
Control panel interfacing and annual functional testing
Multi-stair portfolio maintenance for residential landlords
faq: Why is my stair smoke vent not opening?
Typical causes include failed actuators, jammed hinges, panel or battery faults, and wiring damage. We diagnose systematically and restore or replace as needed.
Do stair vents need battery backup?
Life-safety AOV controls are designed to operate under standby power; we test batteries as part of install and service.
Can you work on high stair cores?
Yes. Access equipment and safe systems of work are planned for tall buildings and included in the method statement.
stairwell-smoke-vent.seo_keywords: stairwell smoke vent, stair smoke ventilation, stair AOV, roof smoke vent stair, stair smoke vent repair North West, apartment stair AOV Manchester

texecom-alarm-installation.name: Texecom Alarm Installation
texecom-alarm-installation.intro: Texecom is a trusted British brand for wired and hybrid intruder systems used in homes and commercial sites. Icomply install and commission Texecom alarm systems across the North West — from Premier Elite-style panels to modern app-connected setups. Our engineers programme zones, set user codes correctly and leave you with a system that is quiet when it should be and loud when it matters.
texecom-alarm-installation.body: We survey entry points and room layouts, then recommend Texecom panels, expanders, PIRs, contacts and sounders that match the risk and budget. Hybrid installs keep reliable hardwired cores while adding wireless devices where chasing is difficult. Smartphone apps, key fobs and optional monitoring are configured at commissioning. Stockport-based teams cover Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire and Merseyside for new installs, panel replacements and service call-outs on existing Texecom estates.
texecom-alarm-installation.meta_desc: Texecom alarm installation & commissioning across Manchester, Stockport & the North West. Wired, hybrid & app control. Fixed-price quotes.
focus_points: New Texecom installs and panel upgrades on existing cabling
Hybrid wired/wireless design for older properties
App, fob and keypad user setup with clear training
Service, batteries and fault-finding on Texecom systems
faq: Do you only fit Texecom, or can you service mine too?
Both. We install new Texecom systems and maintain or expand existing ones after we confirm panel type and condition on survey.
Can Texecom systems be monitored?
Yes. We can configure signalling to an ARC for monitored response where your risk and budget require it, subject to correct grade and confirmation design.
How long does a typical house install take?
Many domestic Texecom installs complete in a day once the design is agreed; larger commercial sites take longer. We confirm programme after survey.

texecom-intruder-alarm.name: Texecom Intruder Alarm
texecom-intruder-alarm.intro: Texecom intruder alarm systems protect shops, offices, warehouses and homes with flexible panels, wireless options and professional-grade detection. Icomply Property Services design, install, maintain and upgrade Texecom intruder alarms across the North West in line with PD 6662 / BS EN 50131 practice. From Stockport we survey premises, specify detection and signalling, programme user codes responsibly and provide commissioning documentation. Fixed-price quotes follow agreement of grade and scope.
texecom-intruder-alarm.body: A well-designed Texecom system balances entry routes, movement detection, shock or contact devices, internal sounders and external deterrents without nuisance alarms. We discuss police response implications, ARC signalling options and app notifications where used. Wireless devices reduce fabric disruption in occupied fit-outs; wired devices suit many commercial shells. Maintenance visits test devices, batteries and communications paths, keeping insurers and duty holders satisfied. Upgrades can migrate older panels while reusing viable sensors. User training reduces false alarms from staff and residents. Coverage spans Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and Cumbria with reactive fault attendance subject to capacity.
texecom-intruder-alarm.meta_desc: Texecom intruder alarm install, maintain & upgrade. PD 6662 focused design. Icomply engineers — Stockport & North West.

Wired and wireless detection with professional programming
Signalling, app alerts and user code management

three-phase-electrical-installation.name: Three Phase Electrical Installation
three-phase-electrical-installation.intro: Three-phase electrical installation powers workshops, kitchens, plant rooms, EV hubs and larger commercial fit-outs where single-phase supply cannot deliver balanced load. Icomply designs and installs three-phase distribution, sub-mains and final circuits to BS 7671 across Greater Manchester and the North West. From Stockport we work with landlords, contractors and end users on new supplies, board upgrades and machine connections with proper testing and certification.
three-phase-electrical-installation.body: Three-phase work demands careful cable sizing, fault protection, discrimination between devices and tidy labelling of L1, L2 and L3 loads. We install distribution boards, isolators, rotary switches and industrial accessories suited to the environment. Coordination with the DNO or building landlord supply is handled early so projects do not stall. Commissioning includes insulation, polarity, loop and functional tests appropriate to the installation. Whether you are fitting a commercial kitchen or a small factory line, we quote defined scopes and keep documentation ready for insurers and building control where relevant.
three-phase-electrical-installation.meta_desc: Three-phase electrical installation across Greater Manchester & the North West. Distribution, plant & commercial power by Icomply Stockport.
focus_points: Three-phase distribution and sub-main design to BS 7671
Industrial and commercial plant connections
Board installation, labelling and protective device selection
Full testing and installation certification
faq: How do I know if I need three-phase?
High-load equipment, large kitchens, workshops and multi-charger EV sites often need it. We assess nameplate loads and diversity to confirm.
Can you convert a single-phase building to three-phase?
Conversion depends on DNO availability and intake capacity. We survey and outline electrical works once the supply position is known.
Do you install three-phase consumer units for home workshops?
Yes where a three-phase supply exists or is being provided—we fit appropriate distribution and protection for mixed domestic and workshop loads.

trade-button-door-entry.intro: Trade button door entry gives contractors and deliveries timed access through communal doors without handing out permanent keys or fobs. Icomply install, program and repair trade button door entry facilities on residential blocks and multi-tenant buildings across Greater Manchester and the North West, balancing convenience for managing agents with security for residents.
trade-button-door-entry.body: A poorly set trade button becomes a security hole; a well-managed one reduces damaged doors and frustrated trades. We configure time windows, integrate with panels and locks, and explain admin options for changing trade hours. From Stockport we retrofit trade facilities onto suitable systems, fix buttons that stick open, and combine trade access with fob systems so residents still use credentials outside trade periods.
trade-button-door-entry.meta_desc: Trade button door entry across Greater Manchester & the North West. Icomply install & program timed trade access on communal door entry systems.
focus_points: Trade facility design with sensible time windows
Panel and lock integration for controlled contractor entry
Repairs for stuck or abused trade buttons
Combined trade button and resident fob strategies
faq: Is a trade button a security risk?
It can be if left enabled all day. We set limited windows and advise agents on reviewing times as contractor patterns change.
Can trade access be disabled on bank holidays?
Depending on the system, schedules can exclude days or be adjusted by an administrator — we programme what the platform allows.
Do all door entry systems support trade buttons?
Many residential panels do; some IP and GSM systems use alternative temporary access methods. Survey confirms options.

urmet-door-entry.intro: Urmet door entry systems serve many UK apartment blocks with robust audio and video panels and flat handsets. Icomply installs, repairs and upgrades Urmet door entry throughout the North West, helping landlords keep street doors secure and speech quality clear. urmet-door-entry.body: Serving Stockport, Manchester and surrounding counties, we handle single-fault call-outs and full entrance renewals. vesda-installation.name: VESDA Installation
vesda-installation.intro: VESDA installation delivers very early smoke detection through aspirating air sampling—ideal for high ceilings, clean rooms, warehouses, heritage voids and spaces where point detectors struggle. Icomply design, install and commission VESDA and compatible aspirating systems across the North West, integrating them with your main fire panel cause-and-effect. Stockport-based engineers handle pipe network design, sensitivity setup and documentation for insurers who specify aspirating detection.
vesda-installation.body: We survey airflow, room volume and dust loading to size sampling pipes and set staged alerts that warn before full fire alarm. Installation includes capillary drops, end-cap verification, transport-time testing and staff training on filters and faults. Planned maintenance keeps aspiration performance stable so early warning remains genuine, not nuisance.
vesda-installation.meta_desc: VESDA installation & aspirating smoke detection. Design, pipe networks & commission — North West. Icomply.
focus_points: Aspirating system design for high or complex spaces
Pipe network install and transport-time testing
Panel integration and staged alert programming
Filter service and performance maintenance
faq: When is VESDA better than point smoke detectors?
High voids, strong airflow, cold stores, clean environments or where earliest possible warning is critical often favour aspirating detection.
Does VESDA replace the main fire panel?
Usually it signals into the building fire alarm system. We design interfaces so alerts and fire signals behave as the fire strategy requires.
How often must VESDA units be serviced?
Follow manufacturer and BS guidance—filters and sensitivity checks are routine. We include aspirating devices on planned maintenance visits.
vesda-installation.seo_keywords: VESDA installation, VESDA fire detection, aspirating smoke detection install, VESDA North West, VESDA Manchester, VESDA Stockport, high ceiling smoke detection, Icomply

video-door-entry.name: Video Door Entry
video-door-entry.intro: Video door entry lets occupants see visitors before releasing the door—reducing porch piracy risk and unwanted access for apartments, townhouses and offices. Icomply designs and installs video door entry systems across Greater Manchester and the North West, from compact villa kits to multi-tenant IP video with smartphone answering. We focus on usable picture quality in real lighting, not brochure screenshots.
video-door-entry.body: Engineers from Stockport specify cameras with suitable IR, rain covers and mounting heights, and ensure indoor monitors or apps are simple for residents of all ages. Networked systems need thoughtful LAN/PoE design; we coordinate with building IT or provide dedicated switches when required. Fixed-price projects include programming, lock interface and resident guidance sheets. Upgrades from audio-only are a frequent request on residential schemes. video-door-entry.meta_desc: Video door entry install across the North West. See visitors on monitor or phone before release. Fixed quotes from Icomply, Stockport.

faq: Do all flats need a video monitor?
Not always—some systems use apps only. We discuss reliability, demographics and backup options if phones are offline.
Will video door entry work without internet?
Local monitors often work on the building network alone; remote phone answering needs internet or cellular connectivity.
Can one video panel serve two entrances?
Many systems support multiple outdoor stations. We design call routing so residents know which door is calling.

wander-alert-system.name: Wander Alert System
wander-alert-system.intro: Want a wander alert system to help protect residents at risk of leaving a care home unnoticed? Icomply supply, install and maintain door wander alerts and related monitoring for care providers across Greater Manchester and the North West. From Stockport we survey exits, fit sensors or wearable tags as appropriate, and train staff on response without creating a prison-like environment.
wander-alert-system.body: Wander alert systems support dignity and safety for residents living with dementia or cognitive impairment. Solutions range from door alarms and delayed egress interfaces to wearable tags and loitering detection — always subject to care planning, MCA considerations and fire evacuation strategy. We coordinate with fire door hardware and nurse call so alerts are meaningful, not ignored noise. Installations include staff indicators, logging where available and PPM for batteries and sensors. Multi-home groups can standardise equipment. Cover: Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and Cumbria.
wander-alert-system.meta_desc: Wander alert system install & service for care homes. Door and tag options — Icomply Stockport & North West.
focus_points: Exit risk survey and appropriate technology selection
Door sensors, tags and staff indication options
Coordination with fire doors and nurse call
Staff training and maintenance of alert devices
faq: Is a wander alert a restraint?
Technology must support person-centred care and legal frameworks — we implement equipment; care decisions remain with the provider.
Will it stop fire evacuation?
No design should impede escape. We work with fire strategies and appropriate delayed egress hardware where approved.
Can it integrate with nurse call?
Often yes — door or tag events can raise staff alerts on the same response platform.
wander-alert-system.seo_keywords: wander alert system, dementia door alarm, care home wander guard, resident wander alert, egress alert care home North West, Manchester

warehouse-alarm-system.name: Warehouse Alarm System
warehouse-alarm-system.intro: Warehouses and distribution units present long perimeters, high ceilings, roller doors and sparse occupancy — a different challenge to an office fit-out. Icomply design warehouse alarm systems that cover dock doors, mezzanines, cage stores and offices with detectors suited to large volumes and vehicle movement, serving logistics and industrial clients across the North West.
warehouse-alarm-system.body: Surveys address roof voids, external yards, battery charging areas and false-alarm risks from birds or HVAC. We may recommend dual-tech or beam devices, heavy-duty contacts, external sounders and robust monitoring paths. Installations are coordinated with site H&S rules, MEWPs where height access is needed, and shift patterns. Commissioning includes full walk and door tests with site managers. Planned maintenance keeps large estates consistent across multiple depots.
warehouse-alarm-system.meta_desc: Warehouse alarm system design & install. Dock doors, large-volume detection & monitoring — Greater Manchester & North West.
focus_points: Large-volume and industrial door protection design
Height-access installation planned with site H&S
Monitoring and keyholder processes for unmanned nights
Multi-depot standardisation for logistics operators
faq: Can standard PIRs cover a high warehouse?
Not always effectively. We specify devices rated for the height and environment, sometimes combining technologies for reliable coverage.
How do you protect constantly used roller doors?
Heavy-duty contacts and careful final-exit design stop doors being left unprotected. Procedures for last vehicle out are agreed with the site.
Do you cover industrial estates outside Manchester?
Yes. From Stockport we cover industrial and logistics sites across Greater Manchester, Cheshire, Lancashire, Merseyside and further into the North West.
warehouse-alarm-system.seo_keywords: warehouse alarm system, industrial unit burglar alarm, warehouse security alarm North West, distribution centre alarm, roller door alarm contacts, logistics site alarm

warehouse-cctv.name: Warehouse CCTV
warehouse-cctv.intro: Warehouse CCTV monitors loading bays, racking aisles, yards and perimeter fences where goods, plant and vehicles are most exposed. Icomply design and install warehouse camera systems across the North West with long-range external cameras, high-mounted internal views and storage sized for multi-shift operations and insurance reviews.
warehouse-cctv.body: Industrial sites need careful lens selection for distance, height and lighting — including night operations and HGV movement. We plan cable routes through warehouse steelwork, use weather-rated housings outdoors and position cameras to reduce blind spots behind racking. Remote multi-user access supports shift supervisors and off-site managers. Power, network and pole or bracket works are coordinated so installs suit live logistics environments around Greater Manchester and neighbouring counties.
warehouse-cctv.meta_desc: Warehouse CCTV for loading bays, yards & aisles. Industrial camera design & install across Greater Manchester & the North West.
focus_points: Loading bay, yard and perimeter camera coverage
Long-range and low-light industrial camera options
Storage retention for multi-shift incident review
Remote access for supervisors and multi-site managers
faq: How high should warehouse cameras be mounted?
High enough to avoid fork-lift and stock interference while still capturing usable facial or vehicle detail at key points. We balance height, lens and resolution on survey.
Can CCTV cover a large external yard?
Yes using a mix of wide overview cameras and dedicated ANPR or zoom views on gates. Lighting and mounting structures are assessed during design.
Do you work in live warehouses?
Yes. We plan method statements and working times around your operations to limit disruption to picking and despatch.
warehouse-cctv.seo_keywords: warehouse CCTV, industrial CCTV installation, warehouse security cameras, loading bay CCTV, warehouse CCTV North West, industrial CCTV Manchester, logistics CCTV Stockport

warehouse-emergency-lighting.name: Warehouse Emergency Lighting
warehouse-emergency-lighting.intro: Warehouse emergency lighting must cope with high ceilings, racking shadows, vehicle routes and large open floor plates while still meeting BS 5266 escape and open-area needs. Icomply design, install and maintain warehouse emergency lighting across the North West, using high-level LED luminaires, bulkheads and strategic exit signage. Stockport engineers survey for realistic mounting, test regimes and impact protection so fittings survive the industrial environment.
warehouse-emergency-lighting.body: We consider smoke plume behaviour only insofar as emergency lighting supports evacuation and firefighting access—not as detection—and focus lux on aisles, fire exits, plant rooms and outdoor final exits. Cold stores and dusty zones get appropriate IP-rated equipment. Duration testing is phased so logistics operations are not blindsided by a full-site drain.
warehouse-emergency-lighting.meta_desc: Warehouse emergency lighting design & install to BS 5266. High-bay LED & testing — North West. Icomply.
focus_points: High-level and aisle emergency lighting design
IP-rated industrial luminaires and exit signs
Phased duration testing around logistics
Maintenance contracts for large floor plates
faq: Do warehouses need open-area emergency lighting?
Large spaces usually do, so people can orientate toward exits. We calculate coverage rather than only lighting the perimeter.
How do you mount lights above racking?
Using suitable high-level fixings and access equipment, planned with your H&S rules. We avoid obstructed photometric paths where possible.
Can you upgrade old fluorescent warehouse emergency packs?
Yes. LED conversions or replacements improve reliability and reduce maintenance at height.
warehouse-emergency-lighting.seo_keywords: warehouse emergency lighting, industrial emergency lighting, warehouse emergency lights BS 5266, high bay emergency lighting, warehouse Manchester, Stockport, North West, Icomply

window-aov.name: Window AOV
window-aov.intro: Window AOVs turn specified façade windows into automatic smoke vents using chain or other actuators linked to a smoke-control panel. Icomply fit, programme and maintain window AOV systems for lobbies, stairs and corridors across Greater Manchester and the North West, balancing free area, security and everyday window use where the design allows.
window-aov.body: Surveys check frame strength, opening type, restrictors and whether the window can achieve the required free area. We install actuators cleanly, set stroke limits, interface to the panel and prove operation on backup power. Occupied blocks need tidy cabling and clear resident communication when windows will move during tests. Service visits re-lubricate, re-tension and replace tired actuators before they leave a window half-open in bad weather.
window-aov.meta_desc: Window AOV actuators, install & maintenance for smoke control. Façade vents to design free area. Manchester & North West.
focus_points: Assessment of windows for AOV suitability
Actuator install with correct stroke and mounting
Panel integration and backup-power tests
Maintenance that prevents seized or half-open windows
faq: Can any window become an AOV?
No — only suitable frames and free areas should be used. We will not force an unsafe or non-compliant retrofit.
Do window AOVs affect security?
Design should consider security when vents open; we follow the specified products and control logic, including timed close where provided.
Are top-hung and side-hung both possible?
Both appear in projects; actuator geometry must match the opening type and required free area.
window-aov.seo_keywords: window AOV, AOV window actuator, automatic opening window smoke, window smoke vent, window AOV Manchester, window AOV Stockport, façade AOV, North West window AOV

wired-intruder-alarm.name: Wired Intruder Alarm
wired-intruder-alarm.intro: Wired intruder alarms remain a robust choice for new builds, commercial premises and high-security sites that want hardwired detection paths. Icomply install and maintain wired intruder alarm systems to tidy professional standards across Greater Manchester and the North West. Our Stockport engineers route cables neatly, terminate zones correctly and commission panels with full documentation for facilities managers and insurers.
wired-intruder-alarm.body: Hardwired systems excel where long-term stability and reduced battery dependency matter. We can reuse viable existing cable on upgrades, expand zones for new rooms or partitions, and integrate door contacts on roller shutters and fire exits carefully so fire safety is not compromised. Commercial graded installs may include dual-path signalling and power supply sizing for extended standby. Request a site survey for cable routes, containment options and a fixed installation quotation.
wired-intruder-alarm.meta_desc: Wired intruder alarm installation & upgrades. Commercial & residential — Stockport, Greater Manchester & the North West.
focus_points: Professional wired design and cable installation
Zone expansion and panel upgrades on existing cabling
Commercial grade options with robust power and signalling
Full commissioning records and user training
faq: Is a wired system better than wireless?
Neither is universally better. Wired suits permanence and many commercial specs; wireless suits fabric constraints and speed. Hybrid often gives the best of both.
Will installation damage décor?
We plan routes to minimise making-good, use existing voids where possible and agree cosmetic expectations before work starts.
Can you convert a wired system to hybrid?
Yes. Many upgrades keep wired core zones and add wireless devices for extensions, outbuildings or hard-to-cable areas.

wired-intruder-alarm-system.name: Wired Intruder Alarm System
wired-intruder-alarm-system.intro: A wired intruder alarm system uses fixed cabling between the panel and detectors for rock-solid communication, strong power for devices and fewer battery visits than all-wireless kits. Icomply designs and installs wired intruder alarm systems across the North West for new builds, commercial fit-outs and properties where long-term reliability matters. We route cable neatly in voids and containment, grade detection to PD 6662 / BS EN 50131, and commission zones with full documentation.
wired-intruder-alarm-system.body: Wired systems suit sites that can accept first-fix cable or have accessible routes for surface trunking done to a professional standard. Detectors, contacts, PA buttons and sounders are powered and supervised from the panel with expander modules where zone counts grow. Stockport engineers cover Greater Manchester and neighbouring counties. Ideal for offices, retail, warehouses and homes undergoing renovation. We can hybridise with wireless points only where cable truly cannot run.
wired-intruder-alarm-system.meta_desc: Wired intruder alarm systems by Icomply. Hard-wired PD 6662 / BS EN 50131 installs across Greater Manchester & the North West. Survey, cable, commission & train.
focus_points: Hard-wired panel, detector and sounder design for long-term reliability
Neat cable routes in new builds, refurbs and commercial containment
PD 6662 / BS EN 50131 grading and zone commissioning
Optional hybrid wireless points only where cable cannot run
faq: Is a wired intruder alarm better than wireless?
Wired offers excellent reliability and lower ongoing battery work. Wireless wins for speed of retrofit. Choice depends on building access and budget.
Will cabling damage décor?
In occupied finished homes we plan discreet routes or hybrid devices. Major chasing is agreed in writing first.
Can wired systems use smartphone apps?
Yes — many modern wired panels support app control and notifications with the correct signalling module.

Icomply survey, install and maintain wireless access control across Greater Manchester and the North West for offices, education, hospitality and multi-tenant properties that need flexible security without major fabric works.
wireless-access-control.body: Wireless does not mean unplanned — radio range, door construction, battery maintenance and free-escape hardware still need engineering discipline. From Stockport we design hybrid estates that mix wired high-traffic doors with wireless internal doors, then train administrators on battery alerts and remote programming. Ideal for phased refurbishments and listed interiors where chasing cables is undesirable.

faq: How long do wireless lock batteries last?
Typically months to years depending on traffic and product; we set monitoring expectations and can include battery changes in maintenance.
Is wireless access control less secure than wired?
Quality commercial wireless systems are designed for security environments; correct install and admin hygiene matter more than the cable debate alone.
Can wireless locks integrate with our existing access software?
Some platforms integrate natively or via bridges — we confirm compatibility before specifying hardware.

wireless-cctv.name: Wireless CCTV
wireless-cctv.intro: Wireless CCTV bridges gaps where digging ducts or running long cables is impractical—temporary sites, listed buildings, wide yards and multi-building estates. Icomply designs wireless CCTV links and battery or mains-powered camera options across the North West, always pairing radio with solid recording and cybersecurity so ‘wireless’ never means ‘unsecured’. We survey line-of-sight, interference and power so expectations match real-world performance.
wireless-cctv.body: True wireless may mean wireless bridging between buildings with cameras still on PoE locally, or fully wireless cameras with robust encryption. We explain the trade-offs in range, reliability and maintenance compared with cabled IP CCTV. Stockport-based engineers cover Greater Manchester and neighbouring counties; fixed quotes follow a site radio check where required. Ideal companions include remote access setup, recording configuration and planned battery or solar checks on remote poles.
wireless-cctv.meta_desc: Wireless CCTV design & install across Greater Manchester & the North West. Bridge links, secure cameras & fixed quotes from Icomply.
focus_points: Radio survey for line-of-sight and interference risks
Secure wireless bridges or encrypted wireless cameras
Power strategy: PoE, mains, battery or solar as appropriate
Recording and remote access integrated with the wider system
faq: Is wireless CCTV as reliable as wired?
Well-designed point-to-point bridges can be very reliable. Wi-Fi-only consumer kits are less suitable for critical commercial evidence—we specify professional gear.
Will wireless CCTV work through thick walls?
Radio prefers clear paths. Thick masonry often needs external antennas, intermediate bridges or a partial cable run. Survey confirms what is realistic.
Are wireless cameras secure from hackers?
We use strong encryption, unique credentials and network segmentation. Default passwords and open guest Wi-Fi are avoided on every install.
wireless-cctv.seo_keywords: wireless CCTV, wireless CCTV installation, CCTV wireless bridge, battery CCTV North West, wireless security camera Manchester, no-dig CCTV Stockport, outdoor wireless CCTV

wireless-cctv-installation.intro: Wireless CCTV installation suits buildings where cable routes are impractical — listed interiors, temporary sites, outbuildings or rapid deployments. Power-over-Ethernet injectors, spurs and solar/battery options can be discussed for remote gates. Hybrid designs use wired cores with wireless edge cameras. Honest advice is part of the service: if cable is feasible and more reliable, we will say so. Coverage from Stockport spans the wider North West.

faq: Is wireless CCTV as reliable as wired?
Wired is generally more consistent. Wireless works well when designed properly but can be affected by walls, weather on long links and network congestion.
Do wireless cameras need power cables?
Most still need a power source unless battery or solar kits are specified. ‘Wireless’ often means wireless video, not wireless power.
Can I view wireless CCTV on my phone?
Yes. Remote viewing is configured as with wired systems, with secure credentials and network setup included.

wireless-intercom.name: Wireless Intercom
wireless-intercom.intro: Wireless intercom solutions reduce disruptive rewiring where cable routes are limited — useful in heritage fabric, occupied flats and rapid fit-outs. Icomply Property Services specify and install wireless and hybrid wireless intercom options that still deliver clear audio or video and dependable door release.
